alpha.desc: The property consists of a primary structure situated within a developed site containing landscaped areas, vegetation, and open space|Access is provided by a driveway connected to a roadway, leading to vehicle parking and circulation areas adjacent to the structure|Multiple outdoor features, pathways, and maintained grounds are visible throughout the property.

bravo.desc: The view shows the primary structure positioned within landscaped grounds containing vegetation and maintained outdoor areas|A driveway provides access to vehicle parking and circulation areas adjacent to the structure|Additional outdoor features, pathways, and open space are visible throughout the developed portion of the site.

charlie.desc: The view shows the primary structure surrounded by landscaped areas, vegetation, and open space|Vehicle access is provided by a driveway leading to developed parking and circulation areas near the structure|Multiple outdoor features and connected pathways are visible within the maintained grounds surrounding the building.

delta.desc: The view shows the primary structure located within a developed property containing landscaped sections and mature vegetation|Vehicle circulation and parking areas are visible adjacent to the structure, with pathways extending through portions of the site|Additional outdoor features and open space are distributed throughout the property.
